subcodes.first_line: A Tablet inscribed hath descended from the heaven of bounty, revealing the hidden meanings like unto a spiritual sun from the mystic horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لوح مسطور از سماء عنایت نازل شد و مستورات معانی را چون شمس جانی از افق معنوی
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @Manifestation of God as sun
